description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by lush landscaping, including a variety of trees, shrubs, and flowering plants. The house features a flat roof and large, rectangular windows that allow for ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, characteristic of contemporary architecture. A swimming pool is visible adjacent to the house, integrated into the backyard area. The property is set on a rectangular plot of manicured grass, with a clear pathway leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes openness, connection to nature, and a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a backyard pool and a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pathway, and dense landscaping with flowering trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, more open lawn space, and a mix of flowering and leafy trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large windows, and a clear path leading from the garden to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, surrounding trees, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a straight pathway, no porch, and a simple door integrated into the facade
